DECLARATION OF LINDA M. TOUTANT IN SUPPORT OF DEFTS' OPPOSITION TO PLTFS' EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR AN ORDER SHORTENING TIME FILED BY DEFENDANT DEJA VU, INC. (DBA THE HUNGRY I) PERRY, ISABELLA CHOWDER HOUSE INC. ERRONEOUSLY NAMED HOUSE AS HUNGRY I, INC. BSC MANAGEMENT, LLC
ORDER SHORTENING TIME ON PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO DEPOSITION QUESTIONS

DISCOVERY 610, TELEPHONIC HEARING FOR THE MOTION. LISA DUARTE, ESQ. FOR THE PLAINTT/MOVING PARTY. LINDA TOUTANT AND MICHAEL B. MARGOLIS, ESQ. FOR THE DEFENDANT/OPPOSING PARTY. MOTION ARGUED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS -- THE COURT FINDS THAT TIMELY OBJECTIONS WERE SERVED TO THE JULY 19, 2004 DEPOSITION OF DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITION OF DEFENDANT IS MOOT AS THE PARTIES HAVE ENTERED INTO A STIPULATION. PURSUANT TO THE STIPULATION, THE COURT ORDERS THAT THE DEPOSITION OF KATHLEEN BACH TAKE PLACE ON SEPTEMBER 7, 2004 AT 9:00 A.M. THE MOTION TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AT DEPOSITION IS DENIED AT THIS TIME. THE COURT EXPRESSES NO OPINION AS TO THE VALIDITY OF THE OBJECTIONS ASSERTED BY DEFENDANT TO THE REQUEST TO PRODUCE SPECIFIED CATEGORIES OF DOCUMENTS. THE COURT CAN NEITHER OVERRULE NOR SUSTAIN A PARTICULAR OBJECTION UNTIL SUCH TIME AS DOCUMENTS ARE ACTUALLY PRODUCED OR WITHHELD BY DEFENDANT, AND PLAINTIFF NOTICES A MOTION PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 2025(O). THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
